originalTitle: Ringleader of suspected human trafficking network arrested in Ethiopia
title: Ringleader of suspected human trafficking network arrested in Ethiopia
content: Yetbarek Dawit is alleged to have operated a multi-million-dollar operation, using torture to raise money.

originalTitle: Carnival fever hits Lagos as locals celebrate Afro-Brazilian heritage
title: Carnival fever hits Lagos as locals celebrate Afro-Brazilian heritage
content: The centuries-old Fanti Carnival returned to Nigeria on Monday with a burst of colour and spectacle.

originalTitle: Dozens killed as Angola flood death toll rises
title: Dozens killed as Angola flood death toll rises
content: Mourning the deaths, the president says it was a "race against the clock" to find others affected.

originalTitle: FIFA opens disciplinary probe against Spanish FA after Islamaphobic chants
title: FIFA opens disciplinary probe against Spanish FA after Islamaphobic chants
content: Barcelona and Spain international forward Lamine Yamal blasted his home support's chants during the match against Egypt.

originalTitle: Massive fire engulfs oil storage tanks near Baghdad
title: Massive fire engulfs oil storage tanks near Baghdad
content: Video showed orange flames and thick black smoke pouring from “black oil” storage tanks in Nahrawan near Baghdad, Iraq.

originalTitle: ‘No end in sight’ if Trump acts on threat to destroy Iran infrastructure
title: ‘No end in sight’ if Trump acts on threat to destroy Iran infrastructure
content: Escalation by Donald Trump is likely to be met with more Iranian attacks, further destabilising region, experts say.

originalTitle: Tracking recent US-Israeli strikes on Iranian infrastructure
title: Tracking recent US-Israeli strikes on Iranian infrastructure
content: Attacks have targeted bridges, steel plants and pharmaceutical facilities, verified videos show.

originalTitle: Wireless Festival cancelled after Kanye West blocked from coming to UK
title: Wireless Festival cancelled after Kanye West blocked from coming to UK
content: West was due to headline the festival in July but drew criticism over past antisemitic comments.

originalTitle: Has Artemis II shown we can land on the Moon again?
title: Has Artemis II shown we can land on the Moon again?
content: The Artemis II mission has been near flawless to date, but has the test flight shown Nasa is ready to send humans to the lunar surface?

title: 'We've become quite experienced in negativity'
content: Arne Slot says Liverpool have no chance against Paris St-Germain unless his side turns up for 90 minutes - after disagreeing with Virgil Van Dijk's comments about the team giving up.

originalTitle: Thousands of England and Scotland World Cup tickets on resale at inflated prices
title: Thousands of England and Scotland World Cup tickets on resale at inflated prices
content: England and Scotland fans hoping to get to ticket to this summer's World Cup finals face paying vastly inflated prices through Fifa's official resale platform.

originalTitle: Beauty forged in pain: Ramsey, Wales' 'best midfielder ever'
title: Beauty forged in pain: Ramsey, Wales' 'best midfielder ever'
content: Aaron Ramsey will be remembered as a great after overcoming shattering setbacks to become a brilliant midfielder for Wales and Arsenal.
